name: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic Italian pizza with fresh tomato sauce, mozzarella cheese, and fragrant basil leaves on a crispy thin crust.

name: Pepperoni Pizza
description: Loaded with generous slices of spicy pepperoni and melted mozzarella on a rich tomato base.

name: BBQ Chicken Pizza
description: Tender grilled chicken, smoky BBQ sauce, red onions, and melted cheese on a golden crispy crust.

name: Classic Burger
description: Juicy beef patty with fresh lettuce, tomato, pickles, and our signature sauce in a toasted brioche bun.

name: Cheese Burger
description: A perfectly seasoned beef patty topped with melted cheddar cheese, caramelized onions, and mustard mayo.

name: Double Burger
description: Two flame-grilled beef patties stacked high with double cheese, crispy bacon, lettuce, and tomato.

name: Orange Drinks
description: Freshly squeezed oranges blended into a chilled, refreshing drink bursting with natural citrus flavor.

name: Mango Drinks
description: Smooth and tropical mango juice made from ripe mangoes, served cold for the ultimate refreshing experience.

name: Strawberry Drinks
description: Sweet and tangy fresh strawberry drink blended with a hint of mint, served chilled over ice.

name: Tiramisu
description: Classic Italian dessert with layers of espresso-soaked ladyfingers and velvety mascarpone cream, dusted with cocoa.

name: Cheesecake
description: Creamy New York-style cheesecake on a buttery graham cracker crust, topped with a smooth berry compote.

name: Chocolate Cake
description: Rich and moist triple chocolate layer cake with velvety ganache frosting — a dream for chocolate lovers.

name: Fries
description: Golden, crispy French fries seasoned with sea salt, fried to perfection. Great as a side or snack.

name: Cheese Fries
description: Crispy fries smothered in warm, melted cheddar cheese sauce with a sprinkle of herbs and spices.

name: Onion Rings
description: Thick-cut onion rings coated in a light, crunchy batter and fried golden. Served with a dipping sauce.
